tasks.description: CREATE peltast-game.html — complete single-file Asteroids-style game
tasks.changes:
Create C:/Users/R3LiC/Desktop/greenfield/peltast-game.html as a complete, working, self-contained HTML5 Canvas game. No external dependencies.

## Theme
Asteroids clone. Player is a Peltast (ancient Greek light infantry). Enemies are Persian Infantry (large hexagon, red), Hoplites (medium square, bronze), Skirmishers (small triangle, silver). Player fires javelins instead of bullets.

## HTML Structure
- Single HTML file, inline CSS and JS
- Dark battlefield background (#0a0a0f)
- Canvas filling the viewport
- HUD div (absolute positioned): score top-left, lives top-right, level top-center
- Overlay div for start/gameover/pause screens
- Gold (#d4af37) color theme

## JavaScript — use clean named variables, NO single-letter variable names for globals

### Constants
```
const CANVAS = document.getElementById('canvas');
const CTX = CANVAS.getContext('2d');
let WIDTH = CANVAS.width = window.innerWidth;
let HEIGHT = CANVAS.height = window.innerHeight;
window.addEventListener('resize', () => { WIDTH = CANVAS.width = window.innerWidth; HEIGHT = CANVAS.height = window.innerHeight; });
```

### Input — single keydown + single keyup handler, no duplicates
```
const keys = {};
window.addEventListener('keydown', e => { keys[e.code] = true; });
window.addEventListener('keyup', e => { keys[e.code] = false; });
```

### Game State object
```
const game = { state: 'start', score: 0, lives: 3, level: 1 };
```

### Player object
```
const player = { x: 0, y: 0, vx: 0, vy: 0, angle: -Math.PI/2, radius: 14, invincible: 0, dead: false };
```

### Enemy tiers array
```
const TIERS = [
  { radius: 38, speed: 0.7, hp: 3, score: 100, color: '#c0392b', shape: 'hex'    },
  { radius: 22, speed: 1.2, hp: 2, score: 50,  color: '#cd7f32', shape: 'square' },
  { radius: 11, speed: 2.2, hp: 1, score: 20,  color: '#95a5a6', shape: 'tri'    },
];
```

### Arrays
```
let enemies = [], javelins = [], particles = [];
```

### Functions needed
- `spawnEnemy(x, y, tier)` — push to enemies array with vx/vy from random angle * tier speed, rotSpeed, hp from tier
- `spawnWave(level)` — spawn (3 + level) tier-0 enemies at random positions away from center
- `fireJavelin()` — push javelin {x, y, vx, vy, angle, life:80} in player.angle direction at speed 10, max 5 javelins, cooldown 10 frames
- `spawnParticles(x, y, color, count)` — push particles with random velocity, life 0.0-1.0
- `resetPlayer()` — center player, zero velocity, invincible=180, dead=false
- `startGame()` — reset all arrays, game.score=0, game.lives=3, game.level=1, resetPlayer(), spawnWave(1), game.state='play'
- `nextLevel()` — game.level++, clear arrays, resetPlayer(), spawnWave(game.level)
- `wrapPosition(obj)` — wrap x/y around WIDTH/HEIGHT with 50px margin
- `distance(a, b)` — Math.hypot(a.x-b.x, a.y-b.y)

### update() function — runs every frame when game.state === 'play'
1. Player rotation: if keys.ArrowLeft player.angle -= 0.055; if keys.ArrowRight player.angle += 0.055
2. Thrust: if keys.ArrowUp, add cos/sin * 0.18 to vx/vy, clamp speed to 7, spawn thrust particle
3. Apply drag 0.985 to vx/vy, add vx/vy to x/y, wrapPosition(player)
4. Decrement player.invincible if > 0
5. Fire: if keys.Space and !player.dead, call fireJavelin()
6. Move javelins: add vx/vy, decrement life, remove dead
7. Move enemies: add vx/vy, increment rot by rotSpeed, wrapPosition
8. Javelin-enemy collision: distance < enemy.radius+4 → decrement hp, flashTime=6, remove javelin, particles; if hp<=0: score+=tier.score, if tier<2 spawn 2 enemies of tier+1 at same position, remove enemy
9. Player-enemy collision: if !player.dead && player.invincible<=0, distance < player.radius+enemy.radius-4 → lives--, dead=true, deathTimer=90, particles explosion
10. If player.dead: decrement deathTimer; if deathTimer<=0: if lives>0 resetPlayer() else game.state='gameover'
11. Update particles: move, fade life by 0.025, remove dead
12. If enemies.length===0 and !player.dead: nextLevel()

### draw() function
- Fill background #0a0a0f
- Draw 120 pseudo-random stars (use index*137.508 % WIDTH for x, index*97.312 % HEIGHT for y)
- Draw particles as filled circles with alpha = particle.life
- Draw javelins: save/translate/rotate, draw a 26px long line (bronze #cd7f32 body, gold #d4af37 tip)
- Draw enemies: save/translate/rotate by enemy.rot; hex=6-sided polygon, square=rect, tri=triangle; strokeStyle=flashTime>0?'#fff':tier.color; draw HP dots above enemy
- Draw player: save/translate/rotate by player.angle; blink if invincible (skip draw every other 5 frames); draw triangle ship shape in gold
- Draw HUD: score, level, lives count as text
- If game.state==='start': draw centered title 'PELTAST', subtitle, 'PRESS SPACE TO BATTLE'
- If game.state==='gameover': draw 'FALLEN', final score, 'PRESS SPACE TO RISE AGAIN'
- If game.state==='pause': draw 'PAUSED'

### Input handling in game loop
- Space on 'start' state → startGame()
- Space on 'gameover' state → game.state='start'
- P key toggles pause

### Main loop
```
function loop() {
  update();
  draw();
  requestAnimationFrame(loop);
}
requestAnimationFrame(loop);
```

## Critical rules
- NEVER declare the same const/let variable twice
- NEVER assign window.onkeydown more than once — use addEventListener
- All brace pairs must be balanced — every { has a matching }
- Use semicolons consistently
- Test mentally: after writing, trace through one game loop tick to verify no undefined references
